name: student-presentation-suite
description: Codex-only suite for controlled student academic PPT planning, editable PPTX production, evidence review, and rehearsal.

interface.shortDescription: 严格面向学生学术 PPT：大纲规划、选项式目标确认、PPTX 制作与 deck 审查。
interface.longDescription: Three Codex skills for student academic presentations: scenario and audience modeling, layered content generation, locked partial revisions, editable PPTX creation, evidence-aware review, page scorecards, rehearsal, previews, and delivery QA.
capabilities: Student academic PPT outlines and Slide Spec handoff
Decision-gated editable PPTX creation and improvement
Speaker notes, visual presets, previews, and delivery QA
Deck review, scoring, and AI-writing risk checks
Static PPTX inspection and review-to-edit change summaries
Scenario and audience modeling with layered content generation
Locked partial revisions, evidence status, page scorecards, and rehearsal
defaultPrompt: 帮我规划一个大学课程汇报的 PPT 大纲和逐页讲稿。
帮我生成或改进一个可编辑的大学生课堂汇报 PPTX。
帮我审查已有学生 PPT，并给出逐页修改建议和评分。
